name: telegram-saas
description: SaaS platform for Telegram bots with PIX, tracking and marketing integrations

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACK,FRONT,PRISMA" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:prisma"
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.db.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.db.yml up -d
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: cd apps/backend && npx prisma db push
